name: Vortex Heart MHD Drive and PVDF Energy Harvester Board Schematic

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: Precision Low-Drop-Out (LDO) Voltage Regulator
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Clamps the internal lithium-ion battery voltage down to a strict, non-fluctuating 3.3V DC ceiling to power the glassy-carbon MHD electrodes safely

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: Biocompatible Sub-Miniature Full-Wave Bridge Rectifier
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Flips the variable high-voltage alternating current (AC) pulses generated by the PVDF chest-wall muscles into raw DC current

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: Solid Tantalum Smoothing Capacitor
circuit_bill_of_materials.specification: 22uF / 25V, Ultra-Low Leakage Current, SMD Case A
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Acts as a tiny energy buffer, filtering out electrical ripples from the rectified muscle pulses before battery delivery

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: Transient Voltage Suppression Clamp
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Protects the internal microcontroller tracking loops against sharp micro-static charges generated along the blood tracks
